name: Leidos Holdings, Inc.
description: Leidos Holdings, Inc. is a global leader in science and technology solutions and services, primarily serving the defense, intelligence, civil, and health markets. Headquartered in Reston, Virginia, the company specializes in information technology, engineering, and science to solve complex challenges for government and commercial customers. Leidos provides a wide range of services, including cybersecurity, data analytics, systems integration, and mission support. With a focus on innovation and digital transformation, the company plays a critical role in national security, infrastructure modernization, and healthcare efficiency, leveraging its deep technical expertise to deliver mission-critical results.
